prompts.description: Filter checkedItems rendering to only show current weekPlan ingredients
prompts.prompt: In components/grocery-list.tsx, locate where checkedItems from Zustand is used to determine checkbox checked state. The bug: checkedItems persists across meal plan regenerations, so stale ingredient keys from old plans (e.g. 'mackerel') appear as phantom checked items in the current grocery list. Fix: the grocery list items must be derived solely from the current weekPlan (do not change this logic). Only use checkedItems to determine the checked/unchecked state for items that already exist in the rendered list — do NOT render any item based on a checkedItems key alone. In other words, if an ingredient name exists in checkedItems but is NOT in the current weekPlan grocery list, it must be invisible and have no effect on the UI. Do NOT call clearCheckedItems() on mount. Do NOT modify lib/meal-store.ts, settings-screen.tsx, or any toggle logic. Do NOT change the grocery list grouping, sorting, or layout. Verify: npm run build passes with no TypeScript errors.
